response.step_by_step_log:
1. Identified song title '迷宮なラビリンス' from on-screen text in the top-left corner.
2. Identified artist as 'Secret Society holoX' (often shortened to 'holoX').
3. Performed web search using query: '"迷宮なラビリンス" holoX Japanese and English lyrics'.
4. Confirmed song title, artist, and extracted lyrics.
5. Identified performers in video as La+ Darknesss, Takane Lui, Hakui Koyori, and Kazama Iroha.
6. Structured video into scenes based on music performance and MC segments.
response.global_summary: A video featuring a performance of the song '迷宮なラビリンス' (Meikyuu na Labyrinth) by the VTuber group 'Secret Society holoX', followed by an MC segment and announcement of membership perks.

scenes.description: VTubers La+ Darknesss, Takane Lui, Hakui Koyori, and Kazama Iroha perform the song '迷宮なラビリンス' on stage with flashing lights. The title of the song appears in the top-left corner.
scenes.performer_in_video: La+ Darknesss, Takane Lui, Hakui Koyori, Kazama Iroha
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
つまり本件、
力こそパワー的な
「迷宮なラビリンス」

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:

scenes.description: The group stops performing and begins an MC segment, talking about their anniversary and upcoming activities.
The group announces new membership perks, including exclusive emojis and wallpapers.
